com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Interface IWorkingProcessInfo


  • public interface IWorkingProcessInfo
    Working process description interface

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getAvailablePerfomance()
      Gets the average available performance based on statistics gathered during the last 5 minutes
      double getAvgBackCallTime() 
      double getAvgCallTime()
      Gets the average time the working process takes to serve one client call
      double getAvgDBCallTime()
      Gets the average time the working process takes to address a database server (during execution of a single client call)
      double getAvgLockCallTime()
      Gets the average time of lock manager calls
      double getAvgServerCallTime()
      Gets the average time the working process takes to execute a single client call
      double getAvgThreads()
      Gets the average number of client threads executed by a cluster working process
      int getCapacity()
      Gets the value of the relative process performance
      int getConnections()
      Gets the number of working process connections to user applications
      String getHostName()
      Gets the name or IP address of the computer where the working process should run
      List<ILicenseInfo> getLicense()
      Gets the list of descriptions for licenses used by the working process
      int getMainPort()
      Gets the IP port number of the working process
      long getMemoryExcessTime()
      Gets the duration of the period when the working process virtual memory size exceeds the cluster limit
      int getMemorySize()
      Gets the size of virtual memory used by the working process
      String getPid()
      Gets the ID of the operating system process that corresponds to the working process
      int getRunning()
      Gets the working process status
      int getSelectionSize()
      Gets the number of calls whose data was used for calculating the statistics
      Date getStartedAt()
      Gets the start time of the working process
      int getUse()
      Gets the value that shows whether the working process is used by the cluster
      UUID getWorkingProcessId()
      Gets the working process ID
      boolean isEnable()
      Gets the flag that is set by a cluster when starting or stopping a working process is required
      boolean isReserve()
      Gets the flag flag indicating that working process is reserve

    • Method Detail

      • getWorkingProcessId

        UUID getWorkingProcessId()
        Gets the working process ID
        Returns:
        working process ID

        Gets the average time the working process takes to serve one client call

        average time the working process takes to serve one client call

        double getAvgDBCallTime()
        Gets the average time the working process takes to address a database server (during execution of a single client call)
        Returns:
        average time the working process takes to address a database server

        double getAvgLockCallTime()
        Gets the average time of lock manager calls
        Returns:
        average time of lock manager calls

        double getAvgServerCallTime()
        Gets the average time the working process takes to execute a single client call
        Returns:
        average time the working process takes to execute a single client call

      • getAvgThreads

        double getAvgThreads()
        Gets the average number of client threads executed by a cluster working process
        Returns:
        average number of client threads executed by a cluster working process

      • getCapacity

        int getCapacity()
        Gets the value of the relative process performance
        Returns:
        value of the relative process performance

      • getConnections

        int getConnections()
        Gets the number of working process connections to user applications
        Returns:
        number of working process connections to user applications

      • getHostName

        String getHostName()
        Gets the name or IP address of the computer where the working process should run
        Returns:
        name or IP address of the computer where the working process should run

      • isEnable

        boolean isEnable()
        Gets the flag that is set by a cluster when starting or stopping a working process is required
        Returns:
        flag indicating that starting or stopping a working process is required

      • getLicense

        List<ILicenseInfo> getLicense()
        Gets the list of descriptions for licenses used by the working process
        Returns:
        list of descriptions for licenses used by the working process

      • getMainPort

        int getMainPort()
        Gets the IP port number of the working process
        Returns:
        IP port number of the working process

      • getMemoryExcessTime

        long getMemoryExcessTime()
        Gets the duration of the period when the working process virtual memory size exceeds the cluster limit
        Returns:
        duration of the period when the working process virtual memory size exceeds the cluster limit

      • getMemorySize

        int getMemorySize()
        Gets the size of virtual memory used by the working process
        Returns:
        size of virtual memory used by the working process

      • getPid

        String getPid()
        Gets the ID of the operating system process that corresponds to the working process
        Returns:
        operating system process ID

      • getRunning

        int getRunning()
        Gets the working process status
        Returns:
        1 - the process is running, 0 - the process is stopped

      • getSelectionSize

        int getSelectionSize()
        Gets the number of calls whose data was used for calculating the statistics
        Returns:
        number of calls whose data was used for calculating the statistics

      • getStartedAt

        Date getStartedAt()
        Gets the start time of the working process
        Returns:
        start time of the working process

      • getUse

        int getUse()
        Gets the value that shows whether the working process is used by the cluster
        Returns:
        0 - not used, 1 - used, 2 - used as a reserve

      • getAvailablePerfomance

        int getAvailablePerfomance()
        Gets the average available performance based on statistics gathered during the last 5 minutes
        Returns:
        available performance

      • isReserve

        boolean isReserve()
        Gets the flag flag indicating that working process is reserve
        Returns:
        flag indicating that working process is reserve
